ogTitle: Deer Vale vs Delungra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deer Vale and Delungra.
heading: Deer Vale vs Delungra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deer Vale, New South Wales and Delungra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Deer Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Delungra (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deer Vale or Delungra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deer Vale has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Delungra scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deer Vale scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Delungra scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deer Vale or Delungra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Deer Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
